title: Forecast accuracy jumped 18 points after close-date validation
anchor: Stage 4 close-date validation rule deployed April 17th moved forecast-to-actual from 58% to 76% across three forecast windows.
connect: Commit tier deals show the strongest accuracy improvement in the period.
body: Stage 4 close-date validation rule deployed April 17th moved forecast-to-actual from 58% to 76% across three forecast windows. Commit tier deals show the strongest accuracy improvement in the period.
trace: Close-date staleness was breaking forecast reliability. Gate enforcement fixed it upstream.

title: Wednesday forecast call runs at 28 minutes versus 90-minute baseline
anchor: Pipeline health report prep automation deployed April 21st cut meeting duration by two-thirds this week.
connect: Eight-week prior average ran at 90 minutes per forecast call.
body: Pipeline health report prep automation deployed April 21st cut meeting duration by two-thirds this week. Eight-week prior average ran at 90 minutes per forecast call.
trace: Manual prep work was consuming meeting time. Automation freed it up.

title: Pipeline definition lock produces one matching number across three teams
anchor: Sales, Marketing, and Finance adopted shared pipeline definition April 14th.
connect: Marketing-influenced and pipeline-sourced figures now reconcile within 2%.
body: Sales, Marketing, and Finance adopted shared pipeline definition April 14th. Marketing-influenced and pipeline-sourced figures now reconcile within 2%.
trace: Three different definitions were producing three different pipeline numbers. Governance event fixed it.

title: Stage 3 conversion rate climbs from 32% to 47% after gate refresh
anchor: New Stage 3 gate requires confirmed champion and mutual action plan since April 4th.
connect: 96 deals have processed under the refined gate definition.
body: New Stage 3 gate requires confirmed champion and mutual action plan since April 4th. 96 deals have processed under the refined gate definition.
trace: Loose gate definition was letting unqualified deals advance. Tighter criteria improved conversion.

title: Stale close-date flags surface 247 deals since April 17th
anchor: Auto-flag rule targets deals with close dates older than 30 days at Stage 3 and above.
connect: 92% cleared at entry gate, replacing 90-minute weekly manual triage.
body: Auto-flag rule targets deals with close dates older than 30 days at Stage 3 and above. 92% cleared at entry gate, replacing 90-minute weekly manual triage.
trace: Close-date drift was happening invisibly. Automation surfaced it systematically.

title: Lead routing exception rate drops from 12% to 1.8%
anchor: Rule simplification deployed April 19th processed 1,420 leads since launch.
connect: Mid-market territory carved from four overlapping rules to one.
body: Rule simplification deployed April 19th processed 1,420 leads since launch. Mid-market territory carved from four overlapping rules to one.
trace: Overlapping territory rules were creating assignment conflicts. Consolidation fixed it.

title: Pipeline coverage sits at 4.1x versus plan in Q3
anchor: Coverage lands within the 3-5x target band with strongest concentration in mid-market segment.
connect: Mid-market stage progression has been reliable across six weeks.
body: Coverage lands within the 3-5x target band with strongest concentration in mid-market segment. Mid-market stage progression has been reliable across six weeks.
trace: Coverage ratio is healthy and concentrated where stage movement is most predictable.

title: Multi-touch attribution disputes resolved on first pass
anchor: Attribution model locked at April 12th QBR addressed 24 disputes from prior quarter.
connect: 18 of 24 resolved immediately; Marketing-sourced and influenced pipeline now match across systems.
body: Attribution model locked at April 12th QBR addressed 24 disputes from prior quarter. 18 of 24 resolved immediately; Marketing-sourced and influenced pipeline now match across systems.
trace: Attribution disagreements were recurring at every QBR. Model lock fixed the majority.

title: Stage 4 mandatory fields show 100% completion across 60 deals
anchor: Required fields competitor, decision_maker, and signed_map deployed April 17th.
connect: All deals advancing through Stage 4 since deployment carry complete structured data.
body: Required fields competitor, decision_maker, and signed_map deployed April 17th. All deals advancing through Stage 4 since deployment carry complete structured data.
trace: Missing battlecard data was making deal review less effective. Gate enforcement fixed it.

title: Account deduplication tightens active count from 1,320 to 1,290
anchor: Dedup rule deployed April 21st merged 30 duplicate company records.
connect: Active account count now reflects actual prospect universe size.
body: Dedup rule deployed April 21st merged 30 duplicate company records. Active account count now reflects actual prospect universe size.
trace: Duplicate records were inflating prospect pool size. Cleanup corrected the baseline.

title: Clari-Salesforce sync reaches 99.4% deal-state match
anchor: Bidirectional sync deployed April 22nd across 1,840 active records.
connect: Wednesday forecast call now opens from single reconciled view.
body: Bidirectional sync deployed April 22nd across 1,840 active records. Wednesday forecast call now opens from single reconciled view.
trace: System mismatch was creating forecast prep overhead. Sync eliminated the reconciliation step.

title: Six redundant dashboards retired across three systems
anchor: Dashboard consolidation audit completed April 21st cleared 11 admin hours weekly.
connect: Reporting consolidated into four dashboards across Salesforce, Clari, and Marketing Ops Looker.
body: Dashboard consolidation audit completed April 21st cleared 11 admin hours weekly. Reporting consolidated into four dashboards across Salesforce, Clari, and Marketing Ops Looker.
trace: Redundant reporting infrastructure was consuming maintenance time. Rationalization freed it up.

title: MQL-to-SQL transitions run 73% under validated automation
anchor: Lifecycle governance refresh April 21st processed 980 leads since deployment.
connect: Median handoff timing sits at 1.4 days.
body: Lifecycle governance refresh April 21st processed 980 leads since deployment. Median handoff timing sits at 1.4 days.
trace: Manual handoffs were creating timing variance. Automation standardized the transition.

title: RevOps deal review attendance climbs to 14 of 14 calls
anchor: Full attendance this forecast cycle versus 4 of 14 prior cycle.
connect: Commit-tier forecast accuracy shows 23% lift on reviewed deals.
body: Full attendance this forecast cycle versus 4 of 14 prior cycle. Commit-tier forecast accuracy shows 23% lift on reviewed deals.
trace: Inconsistent review coverage was leaving forecast quality uneven. Full attendance fixed it.

title: Q2 QBR locks 5 of 7 proposed process changes
anchor: Stage gate enforcement, MQL definition refresh, attribution model lock, Clari-SFDC sync, and routing rule simplification now in production.
connect: Two remaining proposals deferred to Q3 planning cycle.
body: Stage gate enforcement, MQL definition refresh, attribution model lock, Clari-SFDC sync, and routing rule simplification now in production. Two remaining proposals deferred to Q3 planning cycle.
trace: QBR governance delivered concrete process improvements rather than leaving them as discussion items.
